2016-T4-P4-S3.trunk: 引语：we're going to have questions like that where …；it's better to be more aggressive that less aggressive
structure: 句①：we're going to have questions like that where we have things … that don't make sense …
└ 定语从句〔where，修饰 questions〕：where we have things we're doing that don't make sense when the market changes and the world changes
├ 定语从句〔省略关系词，修饰 things〕：we're doing
└ 定语从句〔that，修饰 things〕：that don't make sense when the market changes and the world changes
└ 时间状语从句(when)：when the market changes and the world changes
句②（形式主语 it）：In those situations, it's better to be more aggressive that less aggressive
2016-T4-P4-S3.logic: 句① questions … where…（where 定语从句），内含 (that) we're doing 与 that don't make sense（两层定语修饰 things），when… 时间状语；句② it's better to do（it 形式主语）。
notes: where we have things (that) we're doing that don't make sense：where 定语从句内再套两层修饰 things 的定语从句（一层省略关系词，一层 that）。
it's better to be more aggressive that less aggressive：it 形式主语；（原文 aggressive that 应为 than）。
when the market changes and the world changes：时间状语从句。

2016-T4-P1-S10.trunk: 引语(动名词主语)+he said+but从句：Figuring out a way … would make sense … but if you discontinue it, …
structure: 引语前半：Figuring out a way to accelerate that transition would make sense for them
├ 动名词作主语：Figuring out a way to accelerate that transition
└ 不定式作定语〔修饰 way〕：to accelerate that transition
引语后半(but + if)：but if you discontinue it, you're going to have your most loyal customers really upset with you
├ 条件状语从句(if)：if you discontinue it
└ 主句：you're going to have your most loyal customers really upset with you（have + 宾语 + 宾补 upset）
2016-T4-P1-S10.logic: 引语前半 动名词主语 Figuring out… would make sense；he said 插入；后半 but + if 条件从句 + 主句 have sb upset（使…不满，have+宾+宾补）。
notes: Figuring out a way…：动名词短语作主语；to accelerate… 不定式修饰 way。
he said 是插入语，分隔引语前后。
have your most loyal customers really upset：have + 宾语 + 宾补（使最忠实的客户很不满）。

2016-T4-P1-S5.trunk: 分号并列：The infrastructure … isn't just expensive; it's excessive …（…基础设施不只是昂贵，更是过剩）
structure: 分句①：The infrastructure … isn't just expensive
├ 过去分词作定语〔修饰 infrastructure〕：required to make a physical newspaper
└ 破折号插入（举例）：printing presses, delivery trucks
分号并列分句②：it's excessive at a time when online-only competitors don't have the same set of financial constraints
└ 定语从句〔when，修饰 a time〕：when online-only competitors don't have the same set of financial constraints
2016-T4-P1-S5.logic: 主语 infrastructure 被 required to make…（过去分词定语）+ 破折号插入 隔开谓语 isn't（主谓分隔）；分号接并列分句②，when 定语从句修饰 a time。
notes: 主谓分隔：主语 The infrastructure 与谓语 isn't 被 required to make a physical newspaper（过去分词定语）和破折号插入隔开。
required to make…：过去分词作定语修饰 infrastructure（制作纸质报纸所需的基础设施）。
when 引导定语从句修饰 a time；online-only competitors 纯线上竞争者。
